use_cases: Displaying time-series data trends and patterns for analytics dashboards
Visualizing financial metrics and KPIs in SaaS applications
Showing comparative data across multiple categories over time
Rendering user engagement metrics for product analytics
Displaying sales or revenue trends for business reporting
ai_summary: A responsive area chart component built on Recharts with theming support for light and dark modes. Uses a context-based configuration system for flexible chart customization and styling through CSS selectors. Designed for embedding in dashboards and analytics interfaces to display time-series or comparative data trends.
